heading: Notice of intention to prosecute
label: 1598 Notice of intention to prosecute
text: Before any violation of this chapter is reported by the Secretary of Agriculture to any United States attorney for institution of a criminal proceeding, the person against whom such proceeding is contemplated shall be given appropriate notice and an opportunity to prevent his views, either orally or in writing, with regard to such contemplated proceeding.1So in original. Probably should be “present”.1
